title: Pro-Russia Hacktivists Conduct Opportunistic Attacks Against US and Global Criti

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — Pro-Russia Hacktivists Conduct Opportunistic Attacks Against
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*cisa.dhs.gov*'
            - '*cyber.gc.ca*'
            - '*cyber.gov.au*'
            - '*ncsc.govt.nz*'
            - '*nsa.gov*'
            - '*report.ncsc.gov.uk*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
